---
title: "Pobreza en México"
author: "Pumatecnicos"
format:
    dashboard:
        scrolling: false
        theme: styles/index.scss
css: styles/index.scss
---

```{python}
#| label: Imports

import plotly.graph_objects as go
import pandas as pd
import geopandas as gpd
import plotly.express as px
import json
import requests

```

```{python}
#| label: Generando_grafica_1
#| output: false

# Cargar dataset incluido
df = px.data.gapminder()

# Filtrar un año (para hacerlo más claro)
df_2007 = df[df["year"] == 2007]

# Crear scatter plot
fig = px.scatter(
    df_2007,
    x="gdpPercap",
    y="lifeExp",
    size="pop",
    color="continent",
    hover_name="country",
    log_x=True,
    size_max=60,
    title="GDP vs Life Expectancy (2007)"
)

```

## Row {height=65%}

### Column {width=42%}

:::{.card .enfoque-card-capacidades title="[Enfoque de capacidades ↗ (Click aquí)](notebooks/ods4.html)"}

```{python}
#| label: Figura_1
fig
```

:::

### Column {width=16%}

:::{.card .sticker-card}

![](imagenes/ods1.jpg){.sticker-img}

:::

### Column {width=42%}

:::{.card .enfoque-card-carencias title="[Enfoque de carencias sociales ↗ (Click aquí)](notebooks/ods4.html)"}

```{python}
#| label: Figura_2
fig
```

:::

## Row

:::{.card .enfoque-monetario-container height=100%}

:::{.enfoque-monetario-titulo}

Enfoque monetario

:::

:::{.enfoque-monetario-grid}

:::{.indicador-card}

**Indicador 1**

:::

:::{.indicador-card}

**Indicador 2**

:::

:::{.indicador-card}

**Indicador 3**

:::

:::{.indicador-card}

**Indicador 4**

:::

:::

:::
